name: golden-hoop-spell-opencode

includes: src/ (全部 .ts: index.ts entry + plugin.ts + tools/ + lib/ + lib/scripts/ + prompts/)
shared/ (agents/*.md.template ×3, skill/ghs/SKILL.md, ghs.default.json, ghs.default.json.notes.md, ghs.json.example, opencode.json.example, references/*.md ×6, assets/{features.json,progress.md})
excludes: test/, .ghs/, docs/, bun.lock, tsconfig.json, opencode.json (demo project config)
//packVerified.entryPoint: main → src/index.ts → default-exports ghsPlugin (defined in src/plugin.ts)
//packVerified.importMetaDirNote: src/lib/paths.ts resolves pluginRoot() via import.meta.dir (relative to module file) — works under npm cache / file: install / local per plan §5 risk mitigation
